description: Converged Fonoran concept inventory: 97 primitive roots + grammar particles. Derivable concepts live in data/fonoran-compounds.json; polarity/tense/mood are particles, not roots.
experience_note: Roots carry experience_tier + language_tier + campfire_pass. See docs/fonoran-constitution.md.
